scripts.lambda-build: cd cdk/lambda/amfa && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../.. && cd cdk/lambda/customemailsender && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../.. && cd cdk/lambda/totptoken && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../.. && cd cdk/lambda/passwordreset && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../.. && cd cdk/lambda/authorizer && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../.. && cd cdk/lambda/admininitauth && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../.. && cd cdk/lambda/checkuser && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../.. && cd cdk/lambda/feconfig && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../.. && cd cdk/lambda/postdeployment && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../.. && cd cdk/lambda/signout && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../.. && cd cdk/lambda/verifyrecaptcha && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../..
scripts.deploy: npm run lambda-build && npm run cdk-build && cdk deploy --all --profile $npm_config_profile
